name: io.github.davidmosiah/astral-mcp
description: Local-first, precision-audited MCP server for natal charts, transits, synastry and moon phases. No API key, no account.

environmentVariables.name: ASTRAL_MCP_TRANSPORT
environmentVariables.description: Transport to run. Defaults to stdio. Set to http to expose a streamable HTTP endpoint instead.

environmentVariables.name: ASTRAL_MCP_HOST
environmentVariables.description: Host to bind when ASTRAL_MCP_TRANSPORT=http. Defaults to 127.0.0.1.

environmentVariables.name: ASTRAL_MCP_PORT
environmentVariables.description: Port to bind when ASTRAL_MCP_TRANSPORT=http. Defaults to 3000.

environmentVariables.name: ASTRAL_MCP_ALLOWED_ORIGIN
environmentVariables.description: Allowed CORS origin for the HTTP transport. Defaults to the bound host:port.
